## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Verification

- [ ] `swift build` passes
- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] `./script/build_and_run.sh --release-check` passes
- [ ] For Core Audio changes: tested on real hardware (describe what you verified

## Notes
